author: pk910
content:
Not sure if part of the issue or fallout from it:
Some nodes received the payload for slot 13961 without a BAL (empty byte list).
That triggered the BAL mismatches and is probably the reason for the 13961 payload getting orphaned.
It's mainly visible on prysm nodes, who sent the engine_newPayload with empty BAL via the engine API to ELs  which rejected them (see engine snooper logs)
